name: Purebred Dexter Cattle Association of North America (Dexters Today)
note: PDCA registry; public 'Dexter Marketplace' + 'Dexter Bull Semen' under Buy & Sell (feeds dextermarketplace.com). Treasurer in NC. No login for homepage/marketplace.

name: PDCA Online Pedigree / Member Search
note: Public PDCA pedigree DB with Member Search and Animal Search; no login for browsing.

name: Dexter Cattle Society
note: UK & Ireland breed society (Carlisle, Cumbria); ~1,100 members; herd book, beef map, member sale/hire/AI listings. Public homepage; individual member-listing area is login-gated (not accessed).

name: Six Counties NI Dexter Group - AI Semen
note: Northern Ireland Dexter group AI semen sales (members GBP18/straw, non-members GBP23; e.g. Ballyloughan Chevalier EX95). Page returned HTTP 403 to automated fetch (bot block) but is a real live public page per search index.

name: East Anglian Dexter Cattle Group (dextersea)
note: Regional group / division of Dexter Cattle Society; membership GBP10/yr; public show schedules, sale listings, contacts.

name: Midland Dexter Group
note: Regional group affiliated to Dexter Cattle Society covering Midlands/Gloucestershire/Herefordshire/Oxfordshire/Wiltshire/Worcestershire; public marketplace/news sections.

name: NI Dexter Cattle Group
note: Northern Ireland Dexter group affiliated to UK & Ireland Dexter Cattle Society; public cattle-sales and beef-purchase sections; membership CTA.

name: Irish Native Rare Breed Society — Dexter Cattle
note: Public breed-conservation page; ~1,000 breeding females in Republic; Irish Dexter Group (est. 2014); embedded map locating local Dexter farmers.

name: DCAI Registry service (LB Centre)
note: DCAI herdbook/registry back-end (LB Centre). Live per search but WebFetch hit SSL cert issue; likely valid in browser.

name: Dexter Cattle Promotional Group of Western Australia (DCAI)
note: WA regional group; lists member studs (Billabong, Glenwarlock, Chittering Downs, Smalltime, Rise View, etc.).

name: Dexter Cattle Group of Tasmania (Wix)
note: Official TAS promotion group public site; member info, events, galleries.

name: Dexter Cattle Group of South Australia (Weebly)
note: SA regional group. Note: page advertises migration to sadexter.com (not resolving as of check).

name: Dexter Cattle For Sale Victoria (Facebook)
note: Included only as social presence for VIC private/stud sales; public page.

name: Dexter Cattle Society NZ (dextercattle.nz)
note: Official NZ Dexter breed registry/herd book, incorporated 2001. Public registry, breed standard, governance docs; member area gated (not accessed).

name: Canadian Embryo Transfer Association - Breed Associations
note: Public CETA resource page listing breed associations incl. Canadian Dexter Cattle Association (links to CLRC dexter registry). Embryo-transfer industry body.

name: Bundesrasseverband Deutscher Dexter-Züchter und -Halter e.V. (BDDZ)
note: Official German Dexter breed body aligned with the English DCS; public classifieds, breed info, events, member forms.

name: Dexter Verband Deutschland (DVD)
note: Official German breed representative (member of BRS); Kiel office; runs a cattle marketplace and AI/breeding support.

name: Vereniging Holland Dexter
note: Official stud-book association for NL and Flanders (founded 1993, ~200 members, ~850 registered animals); ZooEasy registry.

name: Dansk Dexterforening
note: Danish Dexter Association (Denmark holds one of the largest herds); breed info, bulls for sale, shows. Actively updated Dec 2025.

name: Svenska Dexterföreningen
note: Swedish Dexter Association (founded 2010); herd book via NAB; growing registrations (178 animals in 2024).

name: Fleischrinder Austria – Dexter
note: Official Austrian beef-breeders association Dexter page; downloadable breeding program, herd-book classification, advisor contacts.

name: Norsk Dexter (TYR)
note: Norwegian Dexter breed section under TYR beef org (~1500 registered dams); membership, breeding plans, 14 regional chapters. Updated Nov 2025.

name: Dexter Cattle Breeders' Society of South Africa (Dextersa)
note: National breed society est. 1953, ~65 stud breeders, four regional clubs. Public breed info, journals, breeder directory page (meet-the-dexter-breeders).

name: Fleischrinder-Zuchtverband Schleswig-Holstein & HH — Dexter
note: Real German beef-cattle breeding association with a Dexter breed page (appears in search). Fetch blocked by a TLS cert-chain error on our side, not a 404/login — treat as likely-live lead.

name: Dansk Kødkvæg — Dexter
note: Danish Beef Cattle Association Dexter breed page (links to danskdexter.dk). Public info/association page.

name: NAB — Svensk Köttrasavel (Dexter)
note: Swedish beef-breeding cooperative Dexter breed page (search-confirmed). Server returned 429 rate-limit (responding, not dead) during verification — likely-live lead.

name: Stackyard — Dexter breeders directory
note: Public breeder/society directory linking Dexter associations worldwide (UK, Australia, Canada, US, Holland, Germany) plus a Breeders Corner. Useful hub for further discovery.

name: Oklahoma Dexter Cattle Association
note: Regional ADCA-affiliated club. Has 'For Sale or Wanted' classifieds and 'Current Membership' breeder directory.

name: Dexter Cattle Texas & Louisiana (ADCA Region 7)
note: Regional group + Dexter Cattle Knowledge Base. Community/info hub for TX/LA breeders.

name: Dexter Cattle World (proboards)
note: Public forum; boards include sales/semen topics. Browsing public, posting needs account. ~1,883 threads, active 2025.

name: Irish Dexter Cattle forum (proboards)
note: Public forum with an 'Auction Barn' livestock-for-sale board; browse without login. Active into 2026.

name: Oklahoma State Univ. Dexter breed page
note: Authoritative breed reference (OSU Dept. Animal Science). Returns 403 to automated fetch but is a well-known live public page.
